context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct chargeback database schema (tables, columns, indexes), handles all three Stripe dispute webhook event types, calculates network-specific response deadlines, and uses Stripe charge metadata to link disputes to orders.

checklist.name: chargebacks table columns
checklist.description: schema.sql includes a chargebacks table with at least these columns: processor_dispute_id (unique), network, reason_code, reason_category, disputed_amount, currency, chargeback_date, response_due_date, status, win_probability_score, auto_submitted, evidence_submitted_at

checklist.name: chargeback_evidence table
checklist.description: schema.sql includes a chargeback_evidence table with at least: chargeback_id (FK to chargebacks), evidence_type, content or file_url, and collected_at

checklist.name: Three database indexes
checklist.description: schema.sql creates at least three indexes on the chargebacks table: one on (status, response_due_date), one on order_id, and one on chargeback_date

checklist.name: All three webhook events handled
checklist.description: webhook-handler.js (or equivalent) explicitly handles charge.dispute.created, charge.dispute.updated, AND charge.dispute.closed — all three event types

checklist.name: Amex deadline: 20 days
checklist.description: Amex disputes are assigned a response window of 20 days

checklist.name: Discover deadline: 45 days
checklist.description: Discover disputes are assigned a response window of 45 days

checklist.name: Visa/MC fraud deadline: 30 days
checklist.description: Visa/Mastercard disputes with a fraud reason are assigned a 30-day response window; non-fraud reasons get 20 days

checklist.name: Expand payment_intent metadata
checklist.description: When retrieving the Stripe charge, the code expands payment_intent AND payment_intent.metadata to extract the order_id

checklist.name: order_id in Stripe metadata
checklist.description: design-notes.md or code comments note that order_id must be passed in Stripe payment_intent metadata at order creation time so disputes can be auto-linked

checklist.name: Score-based dispute routing
checklist.description: After scoring, the code auto-submits when score is high AND days remaining is sufficient, notifies team for manual review for mid-range scores, and sends a low-win-probability notification for very low scores

checklist.name: Status is 'open' on creation
checklist.description: Newly created chargeback records have status defaulting to 'open'

checklist.name: win_probability_score persisted
checklist.description: After evidence collection and scoring, the win_probability_score is stored on the chargeback record
